purpose: Compact factual wording catalog for LevelQualityAudit diagnostics.

diagnostics.label: Clustered level areas present
diagnostics.description: Multiple audited levels sit within the configured cluster distance threshold.

diagnostics.label: Enriched analysis missing
diagnostics.description: The level does not include enrichedAnalysis metadata.

diagnostics.label: Level intelligence report missing
diagnostics.description: The audit did not receive LevelIntelligenceReport context for enriched level explanations.

diagnostics.label: Levels without nearby context present
diagnostics.description: At least one audited level has no attached session, volume, shelf, or market context facts.

diagnostics.label: Limited downside extension coverage
diagnostics.description: The lowest support extension does not reach the configured downside coverage threshold.

diagnostics.label: Limited upside extension coverage
diagnostics.description: The highest resistance extension does not reach the configured upside coverage threshold.

diagnostics.label: No nearby volume shelf
diagnostics.description: No supplied volume shelf overlaps or sits near this level.

diagnostics.label: No resistance above reference
diagnostics.description: The audited level map has no resistance level above the supplied reference price.

diagnostics.label: No resistance extension coverage
diagnostics.description: The extension ladder contains no resistance extension rows for the audited snapshot.

diagnostics.label: No support below reference
diagnostics.description: The audited level map has no support level below the supplied reference price.

diagnostics.label: No support extension coverage
diagnostics.description: The extension ladder contains no support extension rows for the audited snapshot.

diagnostics.label: Reference price missing
diagnostics.description: The audit could not compute nearest-level distances because no reference price was supplied.

diagnostics.label: Session facts missing
diagnostics.description: No session facts were supplied for this level context profile.

diagnostics.label: Extension enrichment coverage gap present
diagnostics.description: At least one extension row is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata.

diagnostics.label: Historical enrichment coverage gap present
diagnostics.description: At least one historical support or resistance level is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata.

diagnostics.label: General enrichment coverage gap present
diagnostics.description: At least one audited level is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata; this broad diagnostic remains for compatibility.

diagnostics.label: Synthetic continuation-map enrichment gap present
diagnostics.description: At least one marked synthetic continuation-map row is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata; it remains forward-planning context, not historical evidence.

diagnostics.label: Volume facts missing
diagnostics.description: No volume facts were supplied for this level context profile.

diagnostics.label: Wide nearest support gap
diagnostics.description: The nearest support below reference is outside the configured nearby coverage threshold.

diagnostics.label: Wide nearest resistance gap
diagnostics.description: The nearest resistance above reference is outside the configured nearby coverage threshold.
